Accordion.title: `ReactNode` — 标题
Accordion.ellipsis: `{expandText: string, collapseText: string}` — 省略配置
Accordion.ellipsisRender: `(props: {open: boolean}) => ReactNode` — 自定义省略渲染
Accordion.arrowClassName: `string` — 箭头容器类名（布局用，不用于选图标）
Accordion.arrowRender: `(props: {open: boolean}) => ReactNode` — 自定义箭头渲染
